name: Native PAGE Running Buffer
nameCn: 非变性 PAGE 电泳缓冲液

notes.en: Same as SDS-PAGE but without SDS. pH ~8.3 forms naturally. Do not boil samples or add reducing agents. Run at 4°C.
notes.zh: 与 SDS-PAGE 相同但不加 SDS。pH ~8.3 自然形成。样品不煮沸不加还原剂。4°C 电泳。

storage.notes: Keep cold; do not add SDS

usage.en: Native PAGE running buffer for non-denaturing protein electrophoresis.
usage.zh: 天然 PAGE 电泳缓冲液，用于非变性蛋白质电泳。
